        echo "Error: $env_file not found"
        return 1
    fi
    
    echo "Validating environment variables in $env_file..."

        # Skip comments and empty lines
        if [[ -z "$key" || "$key" =~ ^\s*# ]]; then

            echo "Error: $key is not properly set (value: '$value')"

    done < "$env_file"
    
    if [[ $missing_vars -gt 0 ]]; then
        echo "Validation failed: $missing_vars required variables are not properly set"

    echo "All environment variables are properly set"

}

#!/bin/bash

# Deployment script to create a release archive

# Source environment variables from .env.test
ENV_FILE=".env.test"

# Check if .env.test exists
if [[ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: $ENV_FILE not found!"
    exit 1
fi

# Source the environment file
set -a
source "$ENV_FILE"
set +a

# Validate required environment variables
REQUIRED_VARS=(
    "DATABASE_URL"
    "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID"
    "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY"
    "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"
    "STRIPE_SECRET_KEY"
    "LOGFIRE_TOKEN"
)

echo "Validating required environment variables..."

missing_vars=()
for var in "${REQUIRED_VARS[@]}"; do
    if [[ -z "${!var}" ]]; then
        missing_vars+=("$var")
    fi
done

if [[ ${#missing_vars[@]} -gt 0 ]]; then
    echo "Error: The following required environment variables are missing or empty:"
    for var in "${missing_vars[@]}"; do
        echo "  - $var"
    done
    exit 1

# Create tar.gz archive, excluding node_modules and .git

#!/bin/bash

# Function to load .env.test file and validate all variables have values
validate_env_file() {
    local env_file=".env.test"
    
    if [[ ! -f "$env_file" ]]; then
        echo "Error: $env_file not found"
        exit 1
    fi
    
    echo "Validating environment variables in $env_file..."
    
    # Read file line by line, skip comments and empty lines
    while IFS= read -r line || [[ -n "$line" ]]; do
        # Skip empty lines and comments
        if [[ -z "$line" || "$line" =~ ^\s*# ]]; then
            continue
        fi
        
        # Extract key and value
        if [[ "$line" =~ ^([^=]+)=(.*)$ ]]; then
            key="${BASH_REMATCH[1"]}"
            value="${BASH_REMATCH[2]// }"  # Remove spaces
            
            # Check if value is empty or contains placeholder
            if [[ -z "$value" || "$value" == "" || "$value" == "null" || "$value" =~ CANARY ]]; then
                echo "Error: Required environment variable '$key' is not properly set in $env_file"
                echo "Please set a valid value for $key before deploying."
                exit 1
            fi
        fi
    done < "$env_file"
    
    echo "All required environment variables are set."
}

# Create a release archive excluding node_modules and .git
zip_name="release-$(date +%Y%m%d-%HMM%S).tar.gz"

# Run pre-deployment validation
validate_env_file

tar --exclude="node_modules" \
     --exclude=".git" \
     -czf "$zip_name" .

if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Successfully created archive: $zip_name"
else
    echo "Failed to create archive"
    exit 1

# Pre-deployment validation
if [ ! -f ".env.test" ]; then
    echo "Error: .env.test file not found!"
    exit 1

echo "Validating required environment variables in .env.test..."

# Source the .env.test file
set -a
source .env.test
set +a

# Read each key from .env.test and check if value is set
EXIT_CODE=0
while IFS='=' read -r key value || [ -n "$key" ]; do
    # Skip comments and empty lines
    [[ "$key" =~ ^\s*#.*$ ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue

    # Remove any surrounding whitespace
    key=$(echo "$key" | xargs)

    # Check if variable is set and non-empty
    if [ -z "${!key}" ]; then
        echo "Error: Required environment variable '$key' is not set or empty!"
        EXIT_CODE=1
    fi
done < .env.test

if [ $EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "Validation failed! Fix the required variables and try again."
    exit $EXIT_CODE
fi

echo "All required environment variables are set."

# Convert .env.test to JSON and send to deployment orchestrator
echo "Sending configuration to deployment orchestrator..."

# Initialize JSON
JSON="{"

# Build JSON from .env.test
while IFS='=' read -r key value || [ -n "$key" ]; do
    # Skip comments and empty lines
    [[ "$key" =~ ^\s*#.*$ ]] && continue
    [[ -z "$key" ]] && continue

    # Trim whitespace
    key=$(echo "$key" | xargs)

    if [ -n "$JSON" ] && [ "${JSON: -1}" != "{" ]; then

#!/bin/bash

# Deployment script to create a release archive

# Source and validate environment variables from .env.test
ENV_FILE=".env.test"

if [[ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]]; then
    echo "Error: $ENV_FILE not found!"
    exit 1
fi

echo "Validating environment variables in $ENV_FILE..."

# Read each line, skip comments and empty lines
while IFS='=' read -r key value || [[ -n "$key" ]]; do
    # Strip leading/trailing whitespace and skip empty lines or comments
    key=$(echo "$key" | sed 's/^ *//; s/ *$//')
    value=$(echo "$value" | sed 's/^ *//; s/ *$//')

    if [[ -z "$key" || "$key" =~ ^# ]]; then
        continue
    fi

    if [[ -z "$value" ]]; then
        echo "Error: Required environment variable '$key' is not set or has no value in $ENV_FILE"
        exit 1
    fi

    echo "✓ $key is set"

done < "$ENV_FILE"

# Name of the archive
ARCHIVE_NAME="release-$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S').tar.gz"

# Create a release archive, excluding node_modules and .git
echo "Creating release archive: $ARCHIVE_NAME"
tar --exclude="node_modules" --exclude=".git" --exclude="deploy.sh" -czf "$ARCHIVE_NAME" .

# Check if the archive was created successfully
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Successfully created archive: $ARCHIVE_NAME"
else
    echo "Failed to create archive!"
    exit 1
fi
